message:
Revert "Update superpowers plugin path to plugins/superpowers-bootstrap"

This reverts commit 2689ead040cdd9c7b1b9b45f591187f792be99e4.

files.patch:
@@ -13,8 +13,7 @@

       },
       "description": "Core skills library: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques",
